SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-29-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PASCUAL, CORAZON S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC. KING SECURITY SERVICES, INC $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, COURT FINDS THAT THE DEFENDANTS OVER REACTED TO PLAINTIFF'S SOUP TASTING CAUSING HER TO SUFFER EMOTIONAL DISTRESS AND HUMILIATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
